targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net total`
FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')

SELECT
  avg(roi) AS `ROI moyen`
FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')

SELECT
  sum(trade_count) AS `Trades`
FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')

SELECT
  sum(skip_count) / nullIf(sum(decision_count), 0) AS `Taux de skip`
FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time,
  concat(strategy_id, ' / ', profile_id) AS series,
  sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net`
FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time,
  concat(strategy_id, ' / ', profile_id) AS series,
  avg(roi) AS `ROI`
FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  sum(decision_count) AS `Décisions`,
  sum(trade_count) AS `Trades`,
  sum(skip_count) AS `Skips`,
  sum(skip_count) / nullIf(sum(decision_count), 0) AS `Taux de skip`,
  sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net`,
  avg(roi) AS `ROI moyen`,
  anyLast(exposure_usdc) AS `Exposition récente`
FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
GROUP BY strategy_id, profile_id
ORDER BY `PnL net` DESC

SELECT
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  sum(signal_count) AS `Signaux`,
  sum(trade_count) AS `Trades`,
  sum(skip_count) AS `Skips`,
  avg(avg_edge) AS `Edge moyen`,
  sum(gross_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL brut`,
  sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net`,
  anyLast(exposure_usdc) AS `Exposition récente`
FROM prediction_core.strategy_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
GROUP BY strategy_id, profile_id
ORDER BY `PnL net` DESC

SELECT
  concat(strategy_id, ' / ', profile_id) AS `Stratégie / profil`,
  sum(trade_count) AS `Trades`,
  sum(skip_count) AS `Skips`
FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
GROUP BY `Stratégie / profil`
ORDER BY `Trades` DESC

SELECT
  if(skip_reason = '', 'inconnue', skip_reason) AS `Raison`,
  count() AS `Nombre`
FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND decision_status NOT IN ('trade', 'trade_small')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
GROUP BY `Raison`
ORDER BY `Nombre` DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT
  concat(strategy_id, ' / ', profile_id) AS `Stratégie / profil`,
  avg(avg_edge) AS `Edge moyen`
FROM prediction_core.strategy_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
GROUP BY `Stratégie / profil`
ORDER BY `Edge moyen` DESC

SELECT
  round(edge, 2) AS `Bucket d’edge`,
  count() AS `Signaux`
FROM prediction_core.strategy_signals
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
GROUP BY `Bucket d’edge`
ORDER BY `Bucket d’edge`

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time,
  concat(strategy_id, ' / ', profile_id, ' exposition') AS series,
  sum(exposure_usdc) AS `Valeur`
FROM prediction_core.paper_pnl_snapshots
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
GROUP BY time, series
UNION ALL
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time,
  concat(strategy_id, ' / ', profile_id, ' PnL net') AS series,
  sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `Valeur`
FROM prediction_core.paper_pnl_snapshots
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  concat(strategy_id, ' / ', profile_id) AS `Stratégie / profil`,
  sum(costs_usdc) AS `Coûts`,
  sum(gross_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL brut`,
  sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net`
FROM prediction_core.paper_pnl_snapshots
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
GROUP BY `Stratégie / profil`
ORDER BY `Coûts` DESC

SELECT
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  sum(trade_count) AS `Trades`,
  sum(skip_count) AS `Skips`,
  sum(decision_count) AS `Décisions`,
  sum(skip_count) / nullIf(sum(decision_count), 0) AS `Taux de skip`,
  avg(roi) AS `ROI moyen`,
  sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net`,
  sum(exposure_usdc) AS `Exposition`,
  (100 * ifNull(avg(roi), 0) + 5 * log10(1 + greatest(sum(trade_count), 0)) - 20 * ifNull(sum(skip_count) / nullIf(sum(decision_count), 0), 0) + ifNull(sum(net_pnl_usdc) / nullIf(sum(exposure_usdc), 0), 0)) AS `Score composite`
FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(observed_at) BETWEEN 13 AND 21))
  )
GROUP BY strategy_id, profile_id
ORDER BY `Score composite` DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE run_id != '' ORDER BY run_id
list.label: Run
list.name: run_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE run_id != '' ORDER BY run_id

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT strategy_id FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE strategy_id != '' ORDER BY strategy_id
list.label: Stratégie
list.name: strategy
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT strategy_id FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE strategy_id != '' ORDER BY strategy_id

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE profile_id != '' ORDER BY profile_id
list.label: Profil
list.name: profile
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE profile_id != '' ORDER BY profile_id

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT market_id FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE market_id != '' ORDER BY market_id
list.label: Marché
list.name: market
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT market_id FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE market_id != '' ORDER BY market_id

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT mode FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE mode != '' ORDER BY mode
list.label: Mode
list.name: mode
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT mode FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE mode != '' ORDER BY mode
